metadata.name: lhs_2016_full_phase3
metadata.description:
Latin Hypercube Sampling sweep targeting the Phase 3 PRIM uncertainty zone
at 2016-block retarget on the FULL (60-node) network.

PURPOSE: Resolve the decision boundary within the outcome-uncertainty zone using
the full network, where economic_split has 24 economic nodes (vs 4 on lite),
giving ~4% resolution instead of 25%. The lite Phase 3 (lhs_2016_phase3) showed
economic_split separation=0.028 — suspiciously low given its 20.2% importance in
Phase 2 full-network data. This sweep restores that resolution.

SECONDARY PURPOSE: With seed=2026 and identical PRIM bounds, this generates the
same 300 LHS parameter combinations as lhs_2016_phase3 — enabling a direct
matched-pair comparison (lite vs full) to validate 2016-block network equivalence.
This is the missing validation that was deferred after 144-block equivalence was
confirmed by targeted_sweep5_lite_econ_threshold.

PRIM UNCERTAINTY BOX (source: tools/discovery/output/2016/uncertainty_bounds.yaml):
  economic_split:        [0.280, 0.779]
  pool_committed_split:  [0.152, 0.526]
  pool_ideology_strength:[0.435, 0.797]
  pool_max_loss_pct:     [0.163, 0.400]
  support: 51.0% of 2016-block data, mean v27_win = 50.0%

DESIGN:
- 300 scenarios via Latin Hypercube Sampling (25 per namespace, 12 namespaces)
- 2 servers × 6 namespaces each (server1: sweep_0000–0149, server2: sweep_0150–0299)
- 4 active parameters only (pool_profitability_threshold and solo_miner_hashrate
  confirmed non-causal at both retarget regimes — fixed at validated values)
- 2016-block retarget (realistic Bitcoin mainnet dynamics)
- Duration 13000s (consistent with lhs_2016_phase3 for directly comparable results)
- Full 60-node network: 24 economic nodes → economic_split resolution ~4% vs 25% on lite

EXPECTED RUNTIME (per server, 6 namespaces parallel):
- 150 scenarios per server, 25 per namespace
- ~4 hours wall-clock per scenario (includes pod startup + 13000s simulation)
- ~100 hours sequential per namespace → ~100 hours wall-clock (parallel)

GENERATES: High-resolution boundary map with full economic_split fidelity.
           Combined with lhs_2016_phase3 (lite), enables lite-vs-full equivalence
           validation at 2016-block retarget. Combined with existing full-network
           2016-block data (n=298 from Phase 2), total full-network n=598 at 2016-block.
